name: Teton Crest (GTNP + Alaska Basin)
notes: Second cross-boundary region: Grand Teton camping zones (permit 4675342) plus Alaska Basin, which sits in Caribou-Targhee National Forest and needs no permit. Teton's payload ships zero coordinates, so all zone coords are curated approximations of zone centers, QA queued. Mileages are standard Teton Crest guide figures flagged est; gains come from the v2.4 DEM pass.

camps.name: AB - Alaska Basin
camps.note: Caribou-Targhee NF, no permit required; first-come. Coords approximate, QA queued.
